nasb.text: “When a man takes a new wife, he shall not go out with the army nor be charged with any duty; he shall be free at home one year and shall give happiness to his wife whom he has taken.

esv.text: “When a man is newly married, he shall not go out with the army or be liable for any other public duty. He shall be free at home one year to be happy with his wife whom he has taken.

cnv.text: “如果人娶了新婦，不可從軍出征，也不可派他擔任甚麼公務，他可以在家賦閒一年，使他所娶的妻子快樂。

ccb.text: “不可叫新婚的人从军出征或办理公务。他可以留在家里一年，使新婚的妻子快乐。
